violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the areas surrounding walk-in freezer evaporator and 2 door reach-in freezer have an accumulation of ice. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. PIC informed. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026

Bottles of milk were observed held at 46 degrees Fahrenheit in the DT beverage cooler. Per interview of PIC, bottles of milk were restocked about 2 hours ago. Food was placed into walk-in cooler to blast chill. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2025

-The lowboy under makeline was observed in poor repair (unit was observed out of service prior to inspection). -The DT beverage cooler was observed at 48 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Unit can only hold foods that don't require refrigeration. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2025
Allergen advisory statement was lacking on menu/ order point. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2024
Commercially processed egg patties were observed reheated to 112 degrees Fahrenheit. Food was reheated to 175 degrees Fahrenheit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2024

Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. Sanitizer was adjusted to proper concentration during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2024
Faucet handle at 3 bay sink was observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024

Water from roof was observed leaking in office. Per interview of PIC, drain on roof was clogged which caused water to leak. Drain was unclogged and area was cleaned during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2024
